text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism using a lightweight, distributed hash table (DHT) to track and prioritize critical, recent, and historically significant memory entries. This ensures the agent doesn't lose context from transient or less relevant data, enhancing its ability to focus on meaningful information.
reason: This improves the plan by addressing the 'WinError 10054' issue, ensuring the agent retains a more accurate and relevant memory representation, thus increasing its effectiveness in dynamic and noisy environments.
